## Entities.Session.IFillingSessionEntity interface

Persisted filling editing session with full editing state.

Contains the complete undo/redo history so the session can be restored to its exact editing state.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IFillingSessionEntity extends ISessionEntityBase 
```
**Extends:** [ISessionEntityBase](./ts-chocolate.entities.session.isessionentitybase.md)
